title: Final Verification Verdict
description: Output from Final Verification Gate — validates each primary goal against current codebase state.

all_goals_met.description: True only if every primary goal status is 'met'

status.description: met=fully satisfied, partially_met=some aspects done, not_met=not addressed, regressed=was working but broken

evidence.description: Concrete evidence (test results, code references, git diff excerpts)

remediation.description: Suggested fix if status is not 'met' (for human decision)

new_issues.description: Issues discovered during verification that were not part of original goals
